title: Add settings control commands
description:
Add CLI commands to control appearance settings.

Commands:
  kbs console settings mode <light|dark|system>
  kbs console settings theme <neutral|cool|warm>
  kbs console settings motion <full|reduced|off>
  kbs console settings font <sans|serif|mono>

Behavior:
- Updates appearance settings in localStorage
- Applies changes to document.documentElement
- Should match SettingsPanel behavior exactly
- All settings stored under 'kanbus.console.appearance' key

Implementation:
- Add SettingsChanged UIControl event with setting type and value
- Frontend handler calls useAppearance setters
- Reuse existing appearance hook logic
creator: ryan.porter
